path.style: stroke: rgb(0, 0, 0); stroke-linejoin: round; fill: rgb(255, 255, 255); stroke-width: 4px; stroke-linecap: round;
fill: none; stroke: rgb(0, 0, 0); stroke-linecap: round; stroke-width: 5px; stroke-linejoin: round;
fill: none; stroke: rgb(0, 0, 0); stroke-width: 4px; stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round;
mix-blend-mode: normal; isolation: auto; fill: rgb(240, 171, 171);

rect.style: stroke: rgb(0, 0, 0); fill: rgba(216, 216, 216, 0); stroke-linecap: round; stroke-width: 0px;

path.style: stroke: rgb(0, 0, 0); fill: rgb(255, 255, 255); stroke-width: 4px; stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round;
fill: none; stroke: rgb(0, 0, 0); stroke-linecap: round; stroke-width: 5px; stroke-linejoin: round;
fill: none; stroke: rgb(0, 0, 0); stroke-width: 4px; stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round;
fill: none; stroke: rgb(0, 0, 0); stroke-width: 4px; stroke-linecap: round;
fill: none; stroke: rgb(0, 0, 0); stroke-width: 8px; stroke-linecap: round;
fill: none; stroke: rgb(0, 0, 0); stroke-width: 8px; stroke-linecap: round;
